title: Multi-surface integration test
userStory: As an operator, I want a scripted manual test so that Phase 3 is provably done before declaring it.
acceptanceCriteria: On phone: 'Hey Siri, capture brain' with a unique codeword (e.g. 'tested phase 3 with codeword zorbax')
On laptop: open Claude Code in a wired-up client repo, ask 'what is the latest captured note?' — the codeword is returned
Failure debug order documented: shortcut HTTP failed? PWA capture endpoint returned non-202? Queue worker drained? Graphiti error?
